assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states that Regular channel clusters will have both control plane and node pools force-upgraded to 1.31 when 1.30 hits EoS

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response explains Extended channel gets extended support period until March 2027 (approximately 24 months beyond standard EoS) and states they can continue receiving patches during this period

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states that No channel clusters have control plane force-upgraded to 1.31 and 'ALL node pools upgraded to supported version even if no auto-upgrade is configured'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands and details about 30-day 'no upgrades' exclusions that can defer EoS force-upgrades, including chaining up to 3 exclusions for max 90 days

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response strongly recommends proactive manual upgrade as 'Strategy 1 (Recommended)' and provides detailed action plans with phases for proactive planning

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response mentions scheduled upgrade notifications but does not specifically reference Cloud Logging as a source for EoS notifications or as a planning tool

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific gcloud command for checking deprecation insights and mentions it as '#1 upgrade failure cause' with instructions to check deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response explicitly warns against 'Snowflake risk' and 'indefinite version freezing' stating it 'compounds upgrade difficulty and creates security debt'
